title: hieracium peccense
intro: Hieracium peccense, also known as lesser hawk's-beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium peccense include its ability to treat urinary tract issues, reduce fever, and alleviate rheumatism due to its flavonoid and sesquiterpene content. In herbal preparations, Hieracium peccense is typically made into a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and poultices to apply topically for skin issues.
